title: Motor Subsystem Dynamic Attributes
description: Dynamic attributes of the motor, defining power output targets and speed signal output.

definition.description: Resource location of the subsystem model, pointing to the corresponding subsystem static attribute definition file.

power_output.description: Power output target, can be any other subsystem name within this part, part connection point name, or 'part', or 'vehicle'.

speed_outputs.description: Motor speed signal output channel and targets. Optional, by default sends motor speed (rad/s) to the motor_speed channel of parts and vehicles.
